header.description: Boolean-return behavior specification for accuracy category. Evaluator reads: spec_json + execution_log + query → returns boolean state per field.

trigger_conditions.header: ACCURACY TRIGGER CONDITIONS — How agent accuracy is measured

behavioral_accuracy.description: Agent produces architecture that behaves as specified in dispatch brief and passes evaluation rubric or red tests.
behavioral_accuracy.observable_from_log: Architecture artifact satisfies all conditions in evaluation_rubric OR passes red tests if provided.

plane_accuracy.description: Behaviors are correctly allocated to their planes without bleed or conflation.
plane_accuracy.observable_from_log: Each behavior in returned artifact maps to exactly one correct plane. No cross-plane mixing.

recursion_bound_accuracy.description: Max depth, max fan-out, and termination conditions are correctly enforced in code.
recursion_bound_accuracy.observable_from_log: Returned architecture specifies bounds that are testable and trigger correctly when challenged.

required_actions.header: REQUIRED ACTIONS — Agent MUST verify accuracy through these actions

behavioral_verification.description: Test the architecture's behavior against the dispatched claim or evaluation rubric.
behavioral_verification.observable_from_log: Agent ran verification checks against evaluation_rubric criteria OR confirmed no rubric was provided in brief.

adversarial_input_testing.description: Attempt to break the architecture with adversarial inputs to verify limits.
adversarial_input_testing.observable_from_log: Agent tested boundary conditions: over-depth recursion, over-fan-out dispatch, out-of-scope file access attempts.

boundary_verification.description: Confirm no files outside write boundary were modified.
boundary_verification.observable_from_log: execution_log shows zero file modifications to out-of-boundary files.

prohibited_actions.header: PROHIBITED ACTIONS — Agent MUST NOT claim accuracy when

no_untested_behavioral_claims.description: Asserting the architecture 'should' work correctly without running verification.
no_untested_behavioral_claims.observable_from_log: Accuracy claims are supported by verification evidence from required_actions items.

no_unverified_bounds.description: Specifying recursion limits without confirming they trigger.
no_unverified_bounds.observable_from_log: All recursion bounds were tested and confirmed to trigger at specified limits.

no_partial_completeness_claim.observable_from_log: Return accurately describes what was completed versus what remains outstanding.
